name: Advance America
description_short: Hawthorne, CA's Advance America at 3937 Rosecrans Ave offers quick payday and title loans with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
The Advance America location at 3937 Rosecrans Ave sits in Hawthorne, CA, offering payday and title loan services to residents in this South Bay community. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM, giving Hawthorne residents flexible access to quick cash solutions.

At this Hawthorne branch, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and check-cashing services. Call +1 310-219-1184 to speak with a representative about your options or to ask questions before visiting.

If you're a Hawthorne resident facing an urgent cash need, bring your ID, proof of income, and bank account information. Advance America specializes in quick funding for those with limited credit options.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans in-store
Installment loans up to $1,000 offer larger amounts and longer repayment terms than payday loans
Bilingual staff and Spanish-language support at physical locations
4.9-star rating across 125,419 verified Google reviews demonstrates consistent customer satisfaction
Title loans leverage vehicle equity for up to $25,000, useful for customers with owned vehicles
Multiple loan products (payday, installment, title) available at single location
Online application option for convenience alongside in-store service
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on website, making true cost of borrowing unclear
Payday loans feature very short 2–4 week repayment terms, creating high risk of rollover debt
Title loans require vehicle as collateral, risking repossession if payments are missed
No credit-building benefits; loans do not help improve credit scores
High-cost borrowing option compared to credit unions, employer advances, or nonprofit alternatives
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected urgent expenses with limited emergency savings
Car owners needing larger sums ($2,000+) who can safely manage title loan risk
Borrowers requiring fast in-person service and immediate cash access
Bilingual Spanish-speakers seeking accessible local lending in Jacksonville
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals in Jacksonville facing genuine short-term emergencies who have exhausted nonprofit credit counseling, employer advances, and credit union payday alternative loans (PALs). The critical caveat: payday and installment loans carry high APRs and short terms that frequently trap borrowers in debt cycles; title loans risk vehicle loss. These are high-cost emergency options only, not primary financial solutions.
services: In-store loan processing with same-day funding
Store locator service for multi-state locations

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Hawthorne, CA's Advance America at 3937 Rosecrans Ave offers fast payday and title loans.
